limitations: Apple data uses public iTunes Lookup and customer-review RSS endpoints.
Google Play data is best-effort from public listing HTML and can expose fewer review samples.
Regression classifications are deterministic review-sample signals, not product, medical, legal, or financial advice.
prohibitedInterpretations: Do not target individual reviewers or generate fake reviews.
Do not treat a sample-based regression signal as a guarantee.
